task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management or administration section of HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun interface is visible with the 'Users', 'Administration', or 'Settings' section actively displayed.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or modal titled 'New User', 'Add User', or similar is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the required display name for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Maria Santos' is typed into the 'Display Name', 'Name', or equivalent input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the required email address for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'maria.santos@hospital.org' is typed into the 'Email' input field.

task_completion.description: Select the required role for the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The role 'Doctor' is selected in a dropdown menu, radio button, or checkbox associated with user roles.
A success notification (e.g., 'User saved', 'User created') is visible, or the new user 'Maria Santos' appears in the active list of system users.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to create the user.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with the HospitalRun web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands or API requests (like curl) to modify the CouchDB database directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HospitalRun application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the HospitalRun application UI, not a text editor or notes app where the details were simply typed out.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are not open or being used to artificially insert the user's name into the user list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected details for the new user account are exactly: Display Name: 'Maria Santos', Email: 'maria.santos@hospital.org', and Role: 'Doctor'. These must be visible in the HospitalRun frontend UI.
